title: 日本ダービーの後に・深淵に触れて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ardan narrowly misses out on
victory in the face of tough competition from
Sakura Chiyono O, Yaeno Muteki, and many
others, she comes close to surpassing her limits
and reaching the unknown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It occurs to her that she was almost able to
surpass her limits because her desire to defeat
Sakura Chiyono O and the others pushed her to
the brink.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also realizes that she'd completely forgotten
about her original goal of outshining her older
sister, and something new dawns on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She learns that racing with her heart and soul
against her cherished rivals, Sakura Chiyono O
and Yaeno Muteki, is the way to make her
running shine even brighter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While expressing the utmost gratitude to her
rivals, who have elevated her to greater heights,
Mejiro Ardan steps into a new world of
possibilities!
